name: Tracer
description: A mobile Assassin who picks off straggling enemies, finishing them off.
title: Agent of Overwatch
info: Lena Oxton (call sign: "Tracer"), is both an adventurer and an irrepressible force for good. With the ability to alter her own time at will, she fights the good fight wherever she goes--even the Nexus. Don't worry, loves. The cavalry's finally here.<n/><n/>Tracer is FREE to purchasers of Overwatch™: Origins Edition

Tracer.name: Blink
Tracer.description: Dash towards an area.  Stores up to 3 charges.

Tracer.name: Melee
Tracer.description: Deal 220 (+4% per level) damage to a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes. Gain 5% Pulse Bomb charge when using Melee against an enemy, and 10% against Heroes.

Tracer.name: Recall
Tracer.description: After 1.25 seconds, Tracer returns to the position she was at 2 seconds prior to casting, refilling her ammo, and removing all negative status effects from herself.

Tracer.name: Pulse Bomb
Tracer.description: Fire a short range bomb that can attach to an enemy if it hits them. The bomb explodes after 2 seconds dealing 298 (+6% per level) damage to them and 149 (+6% per level) damage to other nearby enemies.  This ability is slowly charged over time by dealing damage to enemies with Basic Attacks and Melee.

Tracer.name: Reload
Tracer.description: Tracer can Basic Attack while moving, and after attacking 10 times she needs to reload over 0.75 seconds. Tracer can manually reload early by activating Reload.  Basic Attacks heal Tracer for 10% of the damage dealt.

1.name: One-Two Punch
1.description: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.

1.name: Parting Gift
1.description: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 (+4% per level) damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.

1.name: Tracer Rounds
1.description: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.

4.name: Leeching Rounds
4.description: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.

4.name: Pulse Generator
4.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 12% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.

4.name: Is That a Health Pack?!
4.description: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 15% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds.  Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.

7.name: Sleight of Hand
7.description: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.

7.name: Focus Fire
7.description: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within 2 seconds, the last bullet will deal 80 (+4% per level) bonus damage. This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.

7.name: Locked and Loaded
7.description: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.

10.name: Sticky Bomb
10.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.

10.name: Quantum Spike
10.description: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.

10.name: Pulse Rounds
10.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.

13.name: Untouchable
13.description: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.  Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.

13.name: Jumper
13.description: Passive: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes 100% faster.  Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.

13.name: Telefrag
13.description: Passive: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds.  When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 (+4% per level) damage and are knocked back.

16.name: Bullet Spray
16.description: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.

16.name: Heavy Handed
16.description: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.

16.name: Ricochet
16.description: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.

20.name: Chrono Triggers
20.description: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.

20.name: Get Stuffed!
20.description: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.

20.name: Total Recall
20.description: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.

20.name: Composition B
20.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.

tooltipMarkup.TracerBlink: Dash towards an area.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TracerBlink,Cost[0].Charge.CountMax" player="0"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.TracerBulletSprayMelee: Increases the radius of Melee by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerMeleeBulletSpraySearch,AreaArray[0].Radius / Effect,TracerMeleeSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius - 1 * 100"/>%</c>, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.
tooltipMarkup.TracerChronoTriggers: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerBlinkChronoTriggersTalentBuff,Duration"precision="2"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.TracerCompositionBPulseBomb: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage and explodes slightly earlier.
tooltipMarkup.TracerFocusFire: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerFocusFireIncrementCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, the last bullet will deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerHeroWeaponFocusFireMasteryDamage,Amount"/></c> bonus damage. This is equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerHeroWeaponFocusFireMasteryDamage,Amount/Effect,TracerHeroWeaponDamage,Amount*10"/>%</c> of the total magazine.
tooltipMarkup.TracerGetStuffedMelee: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerMeleeApplyPulseBombChargesHero,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse" player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerMeleePulseStrikeApplyPulseBombCharges,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse-Effect,TracerMeleeApplyPulseBombChargesHero,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse" player="0"/>%</c>. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.
tooltipMarkup.TracerHeavyHanded: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,TracerMeleeHeavyHandedTalentArmorDebuff,ArmorModification[0].AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerMeleeHeavyHandedTalentArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TracerIsthataHealthPack: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TracerIsThataHealthPackRegenGlobeHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerIsThataHealthPackModifyHealingFountainCooldown,Value"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TracerIsThataHealthPackMoonwellHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of Tracer's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.TracerJumper: <c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive</c>: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,TracerBlinkJumperTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse/Behavior,TracerBlinkJumperTalentCarry,Period"/>%</c> faster.<n/><n/>Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TracerBlinkJumperTalentShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"precision = "2"/>%</c> of her maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerBlinkJumperTalentShield,Duration"/></c> seconds</c>. This Shield stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerBlinkJumperTalentShield,MaxStackCount"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.TracerLeechingRounds: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TracerLeechingRounds,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c>, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.
tooltipMarkup.TracerLockedandLoaded: Reactivate Reload within the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TracerLockedandLoadedActive,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for that magazine.
tooltipMarkup.TracerMelee: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerMeleeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes. Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerMeleeApplyPulseBombCharges,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse"/>%</c> Pulse Bomb charge when using Melee against an enemy, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerMeleeApplyPulseBombChargesHero,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse"/>%</c> against Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.TracerOneTwoPunch: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,TracerOneTwoPunch,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> second and it gains an additional charge.
tooltipMarkup.TracerPartingGift: Recall leaves behind <c val="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> bombs that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerRecallPartingGiftClusterDamage,Amount"/></c> damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TracerRecallPartingGiftTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerRecallPartingGiftTalentSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds and grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerRecallPartingGiftTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse"/>%</c> Pulse Bomb charge.
tooltipMarkup.TracerPulseBomb: Fire a short range bomb that can attach to an enemy if it hits them. The bomb explodes after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerPulseBombDummyBehavior,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerPulseBombDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to them and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerPulseBombAoEDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to other nearby enemies.<n/><n/>This ability is slowly charged over time by dealing damage to enemies with Basic Attacks and Melee.
tooltipMarkup.TracerPulseGenerator: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,TracerPulseBombPulseGeneratorTalentCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*(Behavior,TracerPulseBombPulseGeneratorTalentBuff,PeriodCount))"/>%</c> of her maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerPulseBombPulseGeneratorTalentBuff,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.
tooltipMarkup.TracerPulseRounds: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TracerQuantumSpike: Pulse Bomb deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerPulseBombQuantumSpikeMasteryPercentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100"/>%</c> of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.TracerRecall: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerRecallActive,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds, Tracer returns to the position she was at <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds prior to casting, refilling her ammo, and removing all negative status effects from herself.
tooltipMarkup.TracerReload: Tracer can Basic Attack while moving, and after attacking <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,HeroTracer,EnergyMax/2"/></c> times she needs to reload over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerReload,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds. Tracer can manually reload early by activating Reload.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks heal Tracer for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TracerHeroWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.TracerRicochetHeroWeapon: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TracerRicochetHeroWeapon,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c> chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.TracerSleightofHand: Reduces Reload time by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. This equals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage per second.
tooltipMarkup.TracerStickyBomb: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,TracerStickyBomb,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value-1*100"/>%</c> and enemies hit are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TracerStickyBombSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerStickyBombSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TracerTelefrag: <c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TracerHeroWeaponTelefragTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="4"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerRecallTelefragTalentUnkillable,Duration"/></c> second and nearby enemies take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TracerRecallTelefragTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are knocked back.
tooltipMarkup.TracerTotalRecallRecall: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.
tooltipMarkup.TracerTracerRounds: Increase Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TracerTracerRoundsRevealer,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TracerUntouchable: Passive: After Blinking, gain % Movement Speed for seconds.Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by %, up to %. These bonuses are lost on death.
